case_title: GRUNTAL & CO., INCORPORATED vs. LOUDERBACK, JAMES

docket_entries.description: HEARING FOR PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF GRUNTAL & CO., INCORPORATED HEARING SET FOR SEP-02-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 06

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, HEARING FOR PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, CALENDAR OF OCT-21-1994 GRANT AS TO $20,000.00 AWARD WITH INTEREST FROM DATE OF AWARD AT 10%; DENY AS TO $1,200.00; DENY COSTS OF SUIT WITHOUT PREJUDICE, NOT SET FORTH IN PETITION.
ORDER CONFIRMING ARBITRATION AWARD - GRANTED - JUDGE DESMOND.
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: GORDON, AMY LOUISE SUBSTITUTED FOR MACKAY, NORMAN EDWARD AS ATTORNEY FOR GRUNTAL & CO., INCORPORATED
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO MARIN COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT LOUDERBACK, JAMES

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOUDERBACK, JAMES $20,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $20,000.00, WITH INTEREST AT THE RATE OF 10% PER ANNUM FROM SEPTEMBER 23, 1992; COSTS ARE DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE.
